// // This submodule implements the full adder logic using bitwise operations instead of arithmetic
module top_full_adder_module(
    input a,
    input b,
    input cin,
    output reg sum,
    output reg cout);always @(*) begin
        {cout, sum} <= a + b + cin;
    end

endmodule
